200 F2G F2G_NOT_ADJUST (F2G) Does Not Adjust Well Easily to Change in Routine CHAR 1 Psychosocial well-being: unsettled relationships - does not easily adjust to routine change. 0 = No, 1 = Yes, "-" = Unknown, -2 = Space.
201 F2H F2H_NONE_ABOVE (F2H) None of Above Unsettled Relationships CHAR 1 Psychosocial well-being: unsettled relationships - none of above. 0 = No, 1 = Yes, "-" = Unknown, -2 = Space.
